statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Owner Workflow Upgrade slice: Garage Recent Diagnostic Activity now has a derived category filter and `Copy Summary` action without changing the Garage storage schema or vehicle facts.

Changed:
- [garage.html](C:\Users\diazv\Desktop\Ridgeline\garage.html:64), [garage.js](C:\Users\diazv\Desktop\Ridgeline\garage.js:22), [styles.css](C:\Users\diazv\Desktop\Ridgeline\styles.css:5558)
- Search keywords in [search-data.js](C:\Users\diazv\Desktop\Ridgeline\search-data.js:669)
- Service-worker cache bumped to `ridgeline-console-v265`
- Smoke assertions updated in [Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1](C:\Users\diazv\Desktop\Ridgeline\tools\audit\Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1:284)
- Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, and `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`

Verification:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- Playwright/Chrome passed on iPhone-width and desktop Garage checks: populated activity list, service/area filters, copy summary status, and no horizontal overflow.
- Screenshots captured:
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v265-garage-diagnostic-activity-mobile.png`
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v265-garage-diagnostic-activity-desktop.png`

Known environment limits:
- `node --check garage.js` could not run because `node` is not installed.
- Existing Edge `Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1` path still fails with the known missing-main-landmark empty-render issue, so Playwright/Chrome was used as the trusted fallback.

Next clean slice: real-device review of Diagnostics/Garage mobile density, then a file download/export or import/backup pass if the copied diagnostic summary proves useful.
